series_metadata.series_title: Global Positioning System/Automatic Vehicle Location Server Data
series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of GPS/AVL and Hydraulic data from ODOT''s snow and ice fleet that is maintained on ODOT''s server.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Server data (GPS information, hydraulic information, etc.) will be saved 5 fiscal years (fiscal year runs from July 1-July 30th)
